scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Lattice.xcodeproj -scheme Lattice -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' build
scripts.ios:build:ipad: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Lattice.xcodeproj -scheme Lattice -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad Pro 13-inch (M5)' build
scripts.ios:archive: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Lattice.xcodeproj -scheme Lattice -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' archive -archivePath dist/Lattice-iOS.xcarchive
scripts.verify: bun run mac:test && bun run mac:build && bun run ios:build && bun run ios:build:ipad
